_meta.method: Candidate entities collected from GDELT + PH news search (Rappler, Philstar, Inquirer, GMA, Manila Times, PNA, Tribune). Matched to graph firm nodes by exact firm name against the primary-source-verified scandal set. No ambiguous or common-word matches were auto-tagged; had any existed they would have been escalated for review. Persons are handled in overlay.json, not tagged on the firm graph.
_meta.disclaimer: Appearance in news coverage is not a finding of wrongdoing. Each tag links the source article. Statistical indicators derived from public records; patterns may have legitimate explanations.
